You've been invited to HupheAI

Hi {{ .Email }},

You've been invited to try HupheAI.

HupheAI is our new AI workspace for creative teams. This beta starts small and focused: you'll get access to Atelier, the module that helps you build presentations and creative work faster.

What to expect:

  • an early version to explore and test;
  • access to Atelier;
  • space to share feedback on what works and what needs sharpening;
  • no public launch pressure — this is a genuine colleague beta.

Glad to have you testing with us.

Tom
